mechanism: Compressed spring posterior probability of 35-50% for a 20%+ move determines whether FX gamma is positive expected value. Break-even is ~29%; the posterior places gamma firmly above break-even. If probability falls below ~29% (lower tail of CI), the trade breaks down.
regime_dependence: Trade viable while compressed spring probability exceeds ~29% break-even; not robust at the very lower end of the 21-61% credible interval
